title: aglaia rufinervis
intro: Aglaia rufinervis, also known as the Philippine aglaia or Philippine aglaia tree, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae. It is a tree native to the Philippines and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various health conditions. The plant contains various compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it beneficial for reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating infections. Aglaia rufinervis can be prepared in herbal tea form, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
